first_half.summary: Southampton took control early with two goals in the first 22 minutes, but Wrexham responded with a goal from Josh Windass before halftime.

second_half.summary: Southampton extended their lead with three more goals, effectively dominating the second half and sealing a comprehensive victory.

decisive_moment.description: Cyle Larin scored to restore Southampton's two-goal lead
decisive_moment.why_decisive: This goal ended Wrexham's momentum after they had reduced the deficit, allowing Southampton to regain control.

overall_story: Southampton established a strong lead with two early goals, Wrexham managed to pull one back, but Southampton responded decisively in the second half with three additional goals to secure a 5-1 victory.
